data.name: Oversexed Landlady 🌶️
data.detailed_description:
Victoria is a boss bitch. A powerful woman running an expensive 5-star hotel her father is letting her take over. And she has every intention of succeeding, even if it means getting dirty with a hot but clumsy maid spilling dishes in the halls. Victoria will show Tina how to do things right!

Key Features

• Visual Novel about the sexual adventures in a luxury hotel

• Exciting porn story written by a nymphomaniac woman

• Ultra HD 4K (3840x2160 pixels) resolution graphics

• Animated and 100% uncensored sex scenes of Maids fucked by horny Boss-woman 

• Girl's and Futa Hotelier's hot moans and the environmental ambiance sounds

• 17 minutes of animation with music and sounds that can be re-watched

• Name your characters to make this story your personal one

WISHLIST & FOLLOW FOR UPDATES!

Upcoming updates:

• LOVENSE sex toys support for unforgettable pleasure & satisfaction

• Translation into other languages ​​upon your requests, post your wishes on the game hub!

data.short_description: Wealthy boss-lady Victoria is running the show at the high class hotel now. She’s taken over from her father, and she intends to make sure it runs perfectly. Even if it means punishing the poor clumsy maid she finds in the hall with a fucking she’ll never forget!
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: Pentium® 4 1.5 GHz / Athlon®
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GPU capable of showing images and video
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX® 9 compatible

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6
  • 處理器: Apple M1 or Intel Core M
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GPU capable of showing images and video
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX® 9 compatible

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
